debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
idx1 idx2 : ℕ
hidx1 : idx1 < l1.length
hidx2 : idx2 < l2.length
heq : l1[idx1] = l2[idx2]
hperm : l1.Perm l2
⊢ (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2.eraseIdx idx2)

failed_attempts:
have hx : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := by
        have : l1[idx1] ∈ l1 := by
          exact List.get_mem l1 idx1 hidx1
        exact hperm.subset this
      rcases List.mem_erase_iff.1 (by
        have : l1[idx1] ∈ l1.eraseIdx idx1 := by
          simp [List.mem_eraseIdx, hidx1]
        exact this) with ⟨_, _⟩
      have hperm' : (l1.eraseIdx idx1 ++ [l1[idx1]]).Perm l1 := by
        simpa [List.eraseIdx_append_getElem (l := l1) (n := idx1) (h := hidx1)] using (List.perm_refl l1)
      have hperm'' : (l2.eraseIdx idx2 ++ [l2[idx2]]).Perm l2 := by
        simpa [List.eraseIdx_append_getElem (l := l2) (n := idx2) (h := hidx2)] using (List.perm_refl l2)
      have : (l1.eraseIdx idx1 ++ [l1[idx1]]).Perm (l2.eraseIdx idx2 ++ [l2[idx2]]) := by
        exact hperm'.trans (hperm.trans hperm''.symm)
      simpa [heq, List.perm_append_right_iff] using this

classical
      have hmem1 : l1[idx1] ∈ l1 := List.get_mem l1 idx1 hidx1
      have hmem2 : l2[idx2] ∈ l2 := List.get_mem l2 idx2 hidx2
      have hmem1' : l2[idx2] ∈ l1 := by simpa [heq] using hmem1
      have hmem2' : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := by simpa [heq] using hmem2
      have hperm' : (l1.erase (l2[idx2])).Perm (l2.erase (l2[idx2])) := by
        exact List.Perm.erase (a := l2[idx2]) hperm
      have herase1 : l1.eraseIdx idx1 = l1.erase (l2[idx2]) := by
        simpa [heq] using (List.eraseIdx_eq_erase (l := l1) (n := idx1) hidx1)
      have herase2 : l2.eraseIdx idx2 = l2.erase (l2[idx2]) := by
        simpa using (List.eraseIdx_eq_erase (l := l2) (n := idx2) hidx2)
      simpa [herase1, herase2] using hperm'

have hin1 : l1[idx1] ∈ l1 := by
        exact List.getElem_mem l1 idx1 hidx1
      have hin2 : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := by
        simpa [heq] using List.getElem_mem l2 idx2 hidx2
      have hperm' : (l1.erase hin1).Perm (l2.erase hin2) := by
        exact hperm.erase hin1
      have h1 : l1.eraseIdx idx1 = l1.erase hin1 := by
        simpa [List.eraseIdx] using (List.erase_getElem (l := l1) (n := idx1) (h := hidx1))
      have h2 : l2.eraseIdx idx2 = l2.erase hin2 := by
        simpa [List.eraseIdx] using (List.erase_getElem (l := l2) (n := idx2) (h := hidx2))
      simpa [h1, h2] using hperm'

have hx : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := by
        have : l1[idx1] ∈ l1 := List.get_mem l1 idx1 hidx1
        exact hperm.subset this
      have hy : l2[idx2] ∈ l1 := by
        have : l2[idx2] ∈ l2 := List.get_mem l2 idx2 hidx2
        exact hperm.subset (by simpa [List.Perm] using this)
      have hperm' : (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2.eraseIdx idx2) := by
        apply (hperm.erase (a := l1[idx1])).trans
        have : l2.erase (l1[idx1]) = l2.erase (l2[idx2]) := by simpa [heq]
        simpa [List.eraseIdx_eq_erase] using congrArg id this
      simpa [List.eraseIdx_eq_erase] using hperm'

classical
      have hx : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := by
        rw [← heq]
        exact List.get_mem l1 idx1
      obtain ⟨idx2', hidx2', hget2'⟩ := List.get_of_mem hx
      have hperm' : (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2.eraseIdx idx2') :=
        List.Perm.eraseIdx hperm (by simpa [hget2'] using congrArg id heq)
      have : l2.eraseIdx idx2 = l2.eraseIdx idx2' := by
        have : idx2 = idx2' := by
          apply List.get_inj (l := l2) (i := idx2) (j := idx2')
          · exact hidx2
          · exact hidx2'
          · simpa [hget2'] using heq.symm
        subst this
        rfl
      simpa [this] using hperm'

have hmem1 : l1[idx1] ∈ l1 := List.get_mem l1 idx1 hidx1
      have hmem2 : l2[idx2] ∈ l2 := List.get_mem l2 idx2 hidx2
      have hmem12 : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := by simpa [heq] using hmem2
      have hperm' : (l1.erase hmem1).Perm (l2.erase hmem12) := List.Perm.erase hperm hmem1 hmem12
      have her1 : l1.eraseIdx idx1 = l1.erase hmem1 := by
        simpa [List.eraseIdx_eq_erase] using (rfl : l1.eraseIdx idx1 = l1.eraseIdx idx1)
      have her2 : l2.eraseIdx idx2 = l2.erase hmem12 := by
        have : l2.eraseIdx idx2 = l2.erase hmem2 := by
          simpa [List.eraseIdx_eq_erase] using (rfl : l2.eraseIdx idx2 = l2.eraseIdx idx2)
        simpa [List.erase_eq_eraseP] using this
      simpa [her1, her2] using hperm'

have hx : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := by
        have : l1[idx1] ∈ l1 := List.get_mem l1 idx1 hidx1
        exact hperm.subset this
      have hx' : l1[idx1] = l2[idx2] := by simpa [heq] using congrArg id heq
      have hx2 : l2[idx2] ∈ l2 := List.get_mem l2 idx2 hidx2
      have hx1 : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := by simpa [heq] using hx2
      have hperm' : l1.eraseIdx idx1 ~ l2.erase (l1[idx1]) := by
        simpa [List.eraseIdx_eq_erase] using (hperm.erase (a := l1[idx1]))
      have herase : l2.erase (l1[idx1]) = l2.eraseIdx idx2 := by
        simpa [List.eraseIdx_eq_erase, heq] using (List.erase_eq_eraseIdx (l := l2) (n := idx2) (h := hidx2))
      simpa [herase] using hperm'

have hx1 : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := by
        exact hperm.subset (List.getElem_mem l1 idx1 hidx1)
      have hx2 : l2[idx2] ∈ l1 := by
        exact hperm.symm.subset (List.getElem_mem l2 idx2 hidx2)
      have hperm' : (l1.erase (l1[idx1])).Perm (l2.erase (l2[idx2])) := by
        refine (hperm.erase ?_).trans ?_
        · exact List.getElem_mem l1 idx1 hidx1
        · simpa [heq]
      have h1 : l1.eraseIdx idx1 = l1.erase (l1[idx1]) := by
        simpa [List.eraseIdx_eq_erase] using (List.eraseIdx_eq_erase (l := l1) (i := idx1) hidx1)
      have h2 : l2.eraseIdx idx2 = l2.erase (l2[idx2]) := by
        simpa [List.eraseIdx_eq_erase] using (List.eraseIdx_eq_erase (l := l2) (i := idx2) hidx2)
      simpa [h1, h2] using hperm'

-- turn the equality into a common element we can remove on both sides
      set a : α := l1[idx1]
      have ha2 : l2[idx2] = a := by simpa [a] using heq.symm
      -- remove `a` from `l1` at `idx1`
      have hperm1 : (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l1.erase a) := by
        have : l1.eraseIdx idx1 = l1.erase a := by
          simpa [a] using (List.eraseIdx_eq_erase (l := l1) (i := idx1) (h := hidx1))
        simpa [this]
      -- remove `a` from `l2` at `idx2`
      have hperm2 : (l2.eraseIdx idx2).Perm (l2.erase a) := by
        have : l2.eraseIdx idx2 = l2.erase a := by
          have : l2.eraseIdx idx2 = l2.erase (l2[idx2]) := by
            simpa using (List.eraseIdx_eq_erase (l := l2) (i := idx2) (h := hidx2))
          simpa [ha2] using this
        simpa [this]
      -- perm is preserved by erasing the same element
      have hperm3 : (l1.erase a).Perm (l2.erase a) := by
        exact hperm.erase _
      -- conclude
      exact (hperm1.trans hperm3).trans hperm2.symm
simpa [List.eraseIdx] using hperm.erase_get?_perm (i := idx1) (j := idx2) (by simpa using heq)

have hx : l1.get ⟨idx1, hidx1⟩ = l2.get ⟨idx2, hidx2⟩ := by
        simpa [List.get_eq_getElem] using heq
      exact (hperm.eraseIdx ⟨idx1, hidx1⟩ ⟨idx2, hidx2⟩ hx)

classical
      have hperm' : l1.Perm (l2.set idx2 l1[idx1]) := by
        simpa [List.set_eq_modifyNth, heq] using hperm
      have : (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm ((l2.set idx2 l1[idx1]).eraseIdx idx2) := by
        exact List.Perm.eraseIdx hperm' (by simpa)
      simpa [List.eraseIdx, List.set_eq_modifyNth] using this

classical
      have hmem1 : l1[idx1] ∈ l1 := by
        exact List.get_mem _ _
      have hmem2 : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := by
        have : l2[idx2] ∈ l2 := by exact List.get_mem _ _
        simpa [heq] using this
      have hperm' : (l1.erase l1[idx1]).Perm (l2.erase l1[idx1]) := by
        exact hperm.erase hmem1
      have heraseIdx1 : l1.eraseIdx idx1 = l1.erase l1[idx1] := by
        simpa using (List.eraseIdx_eq_erase (l := l1) (n := idx1) (h := hidx1))
      have heraseIdx2 : l2.eraseIdx idx2 = l2.erase l1[idx1] := by
        have : l2.eraseIdx idx2 = l2.erase (l2[idx2]) := by
          simpa using (List.eraseIdx_eq_erase (l := l2) (n := idx2) (h := hidx2))
        simpa [heq] using this
      simpa [heraseIdx1, heraseIdx2] using hperm'

have hmem1 : l1[idx1] ∈ l1 := by
        simpa [List.getElem_mem] using (List.getElem_mem (l := l1) idx1 hidx1)
      have hmem2 : l2[idx2] ∈ l2 := by
        simpa [List.getElem_mem] using (List.getElem_mem (l := l2) idx2 hidx2)
      have hperm' : (l1.erase l1[idx1]).Perm (l2.erase l2[idx2]) := by
        exact List.Perm.erase hperm heq
      simpa [List.eraseIdx_eq_erase, hidx1, hidx2] using hperm'

have hin1 : l1[idx1] ∈ l1 := by
        exact List.get_mem l1 idx1 hidx1
      have hin2 : l2[idx2] ∈ l2 := by
        exact List.get_mem l2 idx2 hidx2
      have hin1' : l2[idx2] ∈ l1 := by
        simpa [heq] using hin1
      have hperm' : l2[idx2] :: (l1.erase l2[idx2]) ~ l2[idx2] :: (l2.erase l2[idx2]) := by
        simpa using hperm.cons (a := l2[idx2])
      have herase : (l1.erase l2[idx2]).Perm (l2.erase l2[idx2]) := by
        exact (List.perm_cons.mp hperm').2
      have h1 : (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l1.erase l2[idx2]) := by
        have : l1[idx1] = l2[idx2] := heq
        simpa [List.eraseIdx_eq_erase, this] 
      have h2 : (l2.eraseIdx idx2).Perm (l2.erase l2[idx2]) := by
        simpa [List.eraseIdx_eq_erase] 
      exact (h1.trans herase).trans h2.symm

have hx : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := by
        have : l1[idx1] ∈ l1 := by
          simpa [List.get_eq_getElem] using List.get_mem l1 ⟨idx1, hidx1⟩
        exact hperm.subset this
      rcases List.mem_iff_get? .1 hx with ⟨j, hj⟩
      have hjlt : j < l2.length := by
        simpa using List.isSome_get?_iff.mp (by simpa [hj])
      have hget : l2[j] = l1[idx1] := by
        simpa [List.get?_eq_get, hjlt] using hj
      have hPerm' : (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2.eraseIdx j) := by
        exact List.Perm.eraseIdx hperm (idx1 := idx1) (idx2 := j) (by simpa [hget] using rfl)
      have hPerm'' : (l2.eraseIdx j).Perm (l2.eraseIdx idx2) := by
        apply list_Perm_eraseIdx (l1 := l2) (l2 := l2) (idx1 := j) (idx2 := idx2)
          (hidx1 := hjlt) (hidx2 := hidx2) (heq := by simpa [hget] using heq) (hperm := by rfl)
      exact hPerm'.trans hPerm''

rcases hperm.nthLe_eq_of_perm heq hidx1 hidx2 with ⟨t, ht, rfl, rfl⟩
      simpa [List.eraseIdx] using (List.Perm.refl t)

have hin1 : l1[idx1] ∈ l1 := by
        simpa [List.getElem_mem] using (List.getElem_mem (l := l1) idx1 hidx1)
      have hin2 : l2[idx2] ∈ l2 := by
        simpa [List.getElem_mem] using (List.getElem_mem (l := l2) idx2 hidx2)
      have hperm' : (l1.erase l1[idx1]).Perm (l2.erase l2[idx2]) := by
        exact List.Perm.erase hperm (by simpa [heq] using hin2)
      have h1 : l1.eraseIdx idx1 = l1.erase l1[idx1] := by
        simpa using (List.eraseIdx_eq_erase (l := l1) idx1 hidx1)
      have h2 : l2.eraseIdx idx2 = l2.erase l2[idx2] := by
        simpa using (List.eraseIdx_eq_erase (l := l2) idx2 hidx2)
      simpa [h1, h2] using hperm'

classical
      simpa [List.eraseIdx] using (hperm.erase (by simpa using heq))

have hx : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := by
        simpa [heq] using hperm.subset (by
          simpa [List.mem_iff_get] using ⟨idx1, hidx1, rfl⟩)
      rcases List.mem_iff_get.mp hx with ⟨j, hj, hjEq⟩
      have : (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2.eraseIdx j) := by
        exact (hperm.erase (by simpa using hjEq))
      have hj' : j = idx2 := by
        have : l2[j] = l2[idx2] := by simpa [hjEq, heq]
        exact List.get?_inj_iff.mp this
      subst hj'
      simpa using this

have hmem1 : l1[idx1] ∈ l1 := by
        exact List.getElem_mem l1 idx1 hidx1
      have hmem2 : l2[idx2] ∈ l2 := by
        exact List.getElem_mem l2 idx2 hidx2
      have hperm' : (l1.erase hidx1).Perm (l2.erase hidx2) := by
        exact hperm.erase hmem1
      simpa [List.erase_getElem] using hperm'

have hmem2 : l2[idx2] ∈ l1 := by
        have : l2[idx2] ∈ l2 := List.get_mem (l := l2) ⟨idx2, hidx2⟩
        exact hperm.symm.subset this
      obtain ⟨idx1' : Fin l1.length, hidx1'⟩ := in_list_idx (l := l1) (x := l2[idx2]) hmem2
      have hperm' : (l1.eraseIdx idx1').Perm (l2.eraseIdx idx2) := by
        exact List.Perm.eraseIdx (idx := idx2) (h := hperm.symm.trans (List.perm_eraseIdx_of_get_eq (idx := idx1') hidx1')).symm
      have hidx1eq : idx1' = ⟨idx1, hidx1⟩ := by
        apply Fin.ext
        have : l1[idx1] = l1[idx1'] := by
          simpa [heq, hidx1'] using congrArg id (heq.trans hidx1'.symm)
        exact List.get_inj_iff.mp this
      simpa [hidx1eq] using hperm'

have hx : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := by
        rw [← List.perm_iff_mem] at hperm
        exact hperm.1 (by simpa using List.getElem_mem l1 idx1)
      have hx' : l2[idx2] ∈ l1 := by
        rw [List.perm_iff_mem] at hperm
        exact hperm.2 (by simpa using List.getElem_mem l2 idx2)
      have hperm' : (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2.eraseIdx idx2) := by
        have h1 : (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l1.erase l1[idx1]) := by
          simpa [List.eraseIdx_eq_erase] using (List.Perm.refl (l := l1.eraseIdx idx1))
        have h2 : (l2.eraseIdx idx2).Perm (l2.erase l2[idx2]) := by
          simpa [List.eraseIdx_eq_erase] using (List.Perm.refl (l := l2.eraseIdx idx2))
        have hmain : (l1.erase l1[idx1]).Perm (l2.erase l2[idx2]) := by
          exact List.Perm.erase hperm heq
        exact (h1.symm.trans (hmain.trans h2))
      exact hperm'

have hin1 : l1[idx1] ∈ l1 := by
        exact List.get_mem l1 idx1 hidx1
      have hin2 : l2[idx2] ∈ l2 := by
        exact List.get_mem l2 idx2 hidx2
      have hmem : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := by
        exact (hperm.subset hin1)
      have hperm' : (l1.erase l1[idx1]).Perm (l2.erase l1[idx1]) := by
        exact List.Perm.erase hperm (a := l1[idx1])
      have herase1 : l1.eraseIdx idx1 = l1.erase l1[idx1] := by
        exact (List.eraseIdx_eq_erase (l := l1) (n := idx1) (h := hidx1)).symm
      have herase2 : l2.eraseIdx idx2 = l2.erase l1[idx1] := by
        have : l2.eraseIdx idx2 = l2.erase l2[idx2] := by
          exact (List.eraseIdx_eq_erase (l := l2) (n := idx2) (h := hidx2)).symm
        simpa [heq] using this
      simpa [herase1, herase2] using hperm'

have hx : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := by simpa [heq] using hperm.subset (List.getElem_mem l1 idx1)
      obtain ⟨idx2', hidx2'⟩ := in_list_idx hx
      have hperm' : l1.Perm l2 := hperm
      have : (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2.eraseIdx idx2') := by
        exact List.Perm.eraseIdx hperm' (i := ⟨idx1, hidx1⟩) (j := ⟨idx2', by simpa using (show idx2' < l2.length from by
          simpa [List.length] using (show idx2' < l2.length from by
            have : idx2' < l2.length := by
              have := List.getElem?_eq_getElem? (l := l2) (n := idx2')
              exact (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_eq (by
                have : idx2' < l2.length := by
                  have : idx2' < l2.length := by
                    exact Fin.is_lt ⟨idx2', by
                      have : idx2' < l2.length := by
                        -- extracted from hidx2' below
                        sorry⟩
                  exact this
                exact this) rfl) )⟩) (by
          -- element equality at indices
          have : l1[idx1] = l2[idx2'] := by simpa using hidx2'
          simpa using this)
      -- idx2 is assumed to satisfy heq; replace idx2' by idx2 using get-equality and eraseIdx congruence
      -- We can use idx2 itself since heq is given:
      simpa using (List.Perm.eraseIdx hperm (i := ⟨idx1, hidx1⟩) (j := ⟨idx2, hidx2⟩) (by simpa using heq))
simpa [List.eraseIdx_eq_eraseNthLe] using hperm.eraseNthLe hidx1 hidx2 heq

have hmem1 : l1[idx1] ∈ l1 := List.get_mem _ _ 
    have hmem2 : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := by simpa [heq] using hperm.subset hmem1
    have hmem2' : l2[idx2] ∈ l2 := by simpa [heq] using hmem2
    have hperm' : l1.erase (l1[idx1]) ~ l2.erase (l2[idx2]) := hperm.erase heq
    have h1 : l1.eraseIdx idx1 ~ l1.erase (l1[idx1]) := by
      simpa [List.eraseIdx_eq_erase, Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hidx1 (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_self _))]
        using (List.eraseIdx_eq_erase (l := l1) (idx := ⟨idx1, hidx1⟩))
    have h2 : l2.eraseIdx idx2 ~ l2.erase (l2[idx2]) := by
      simpa [List.eraseIdx_eq_erase, Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hidx2 (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_self _))]
        using (List.eraseIdx_eq_erase (l := l2) (idx := ⟨idx2, hidx2⟩))
    exact h1.trans (hperm'.trans h2.symm)
simpa [List.eraseIdx] using hperm.erase (by simpa using heq)

have hin1 : l1[idx1] ∈ l1 := by
        simpa [List.getElem_mem] using (List.getElem_mem l1 idx1 hidx1)
      have hin2 : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := by
        have : l2[idx2] ∈ l2 := by
          simpa [List.getElem_mem] using (List.getElem_mem l2 idx2 hidx2)
        simpa [heq] using this
      have hperm' : (l1.erase (l1[idx1])).Perm (l2.erase (l1[idx1])) :=
        hperm.erase hin1
      have herase1 : l1.eraseIdx idx1 = l1.erase (l1[idx1]) := by
        simpa using (List.eraseIdx_eq_erase (l := l1) (i := idx1) (h := hidx1))
      have herase2 : l2.eraseIdx idx2 = l2.erase (l1[idx1]) := by
        have : l2.eraseIdx idx2 = l2.erase (l2[idx2]) := by
          simpa using (List.eraseIdx_eq_erase (l := l2) (i := idx2) (h := hidx2))
        simpa [heq] using this
      simpa [herase1, herase2] using hperm'

have hx : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := by
        have : l1[idx1] ∈ l1 := by
          simpa [List.mem_iff_getElem] using ⟨idx1, hidx1, rfl⟩
        exact hperm.subset this
      obtain ⟨j, hj, rfl⟩ := List.mem_iff_getElem.mp hx
      have hperm' : (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2.eraseIdx j) := by
        exact (List.Perm.eraseIdx hperm idx1 j)
      have hj' : j = idx2 := by
        have := congrArg (fun x => x) heq
        simpa using (Fin.eq_of_val_eq (by simpa [List.getElem?_eq_getElem, hj, hidx2] using heq))
      subst hj'
      exact hperm'

have hin1 : l1[idx1] ∈ l1 := by
      exact List.getElem_mem l1 idx1 hidx1
    have hin2 : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := by
      simpa [heq] using (hperm.subset hin1)
    have hperm' : (l1.erase l1[idx1]).Perm (l2.erase l1[idx1]) :=
      hperm.erase (l1[idx1])
    have herase1 : l1.eraseIdx idx1 = l1.erase (l1[idx1]) := by
      exact (List.eraseIdx_eq_erase (l := l1) (idx := idx1) hidx1).symm
    have herase2 : l2.eraseIdx idx2 = l2.erase (l1[idx1]) := by
      have : l2.eraseIdx idx2 = l2.erase (l2[idx2]) := by
        exact (List.eraseIdx_eq_erase (l := l2) (idx := idx2) hidx2).symm
      simpa [heq] using this
    simpa [herase1, herase2] using hperm'

classical
      have hperm' : l1.eraseIdx idx1 ~ l2.eraseIdx idx2 := by
        simpa [List.Perm] using hperm.eraseIdx idx1 idx2 heq
      simpa [List.Perm] using hperm'
